name: case2-combined
description: Max age + max total size together, dry-run OFF (commit mode). Age cleans the very old items, size eviction trims the oldest of what remains.

_reasoning: maxAge=30: deletes a1-old (50d). Retained = a3(2500) + a2(1500) + a4(2000) + a5(1000) = 7000 bytes.
maxTotalSize=5000: must shed 2000. Evict oldest first: a3(10d, 2500B). Retained = 4500 (under cap, stop).
Final deleted = {a1-old, a3-medium} = 2000+2500 = 4500. Retained = {a2-small, a4-fresh, a5-newest} = 4500.
